citations.quote: The accommodation support service can: ... Provide a dedicated member of staff to provide information and to answer any related queries

findings.text: The brochure describes an accommodation support service available to students, including advice, flat viewings, and a dedicated staff member.
The brochure does not contain any records of individual student contacts, emails, or casenotes.
No internal records (emails, casenotes, logs) of Anfal's contact with the accommodation support service were provided in this work order.

proposed_tasks.instructions: Search the matter's internal records (emails, casenotes, support logs) for any communication from or about Anfal regarding the accommodation support service. Look for emails to/from privateaccommodation@napier.ac.uk or accommodation@napier.ac.uk, and any casenotes referencing Anfal. Report any findings or confirm absence.
proposed_tasks.title: Search for internal records of Anfal's contact with accommodation support service

summary: Reviewed NAP-SRC-0014 (Private Accommodation Brochure 2025) for evidence of Anfal's contact with the accommodation support service. The brochure describes the service but contains no records of individual student contacts. No internal emails, casenotes, or logs were provided. A follow-up task is proposed to search for actual contact records.

uncertainties.text: Whether Anfal ever contacted the accommodation support service is unknown from the provided source.
